infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Forged by Freedom to access your camera to scan food barcodes for nutrition tracking.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Forged by Freedom reads your health data (steps, sleep, heart rate, body temperature, workouts) to auto-fill your daily check-in.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Forged by Freedom does not write any data to Apple Health.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Forged by Freedom uses your location to find nearby gyms and fitness facilities.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Forged by Freedom to access your photos for progress tracking.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Forged by Freedom to access your camera for progress photos.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Forged by Freedom to use your microphone for voice notes.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Forged by Freedom to access your camera to scan food barcodes for nutrition tracking.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Forged by Freedom uses your location to find nearby gyms and fitness facilities.
